properties.name: civitas.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens (hex-encoded).

properties.name: civitas.jwt.access-token-expiration
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds. Default: 3600000 (1 hour).

properties.name: civitas.jwt.refresh-token-expiration
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds. Default: 604800000 (7 days).
